heroDescription: Wan provides open video generation models for text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-guided video, and video editing workflows.
seoDescription: Compare Wan AI video models on Novita AI, including Wan 2.7, 2.6, 2.5, 2.2, and 2.1 variants for video generation and editing.
overviewBody: Wan is a video generation model family used for creating clips from text prompts, source images, reference assets, and existing video. It is useful for creative generation, concept previews, advertising assets, and short-form production workflows.
Novita AI exposes Wan variants across text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, video-to-video, and video editing so teams can choose the input mode that matches their production pipeline.
Use this collection to compare Wan versions and generation modes, then open a model page for current API parameters, pricing, and Playground testing.

capabilities.title: Text-to-video generation
capabilities.description: Create video clips directly from prompts for creative drafts, social assets, and visual exploration.

capabilities.title: Image and reference guided video
capabilities.description: Animate source images or use references when a subject, product, or visual direction needs to stay consistent.

capabilities.title: Video editing and video reference workflows
capabilities.description: Use newer Wan entries for editing, transforming, or guiding videos from existing visual material.

capabilities.title: Versioned model comparison
capabilities.description: Compare Wan 2.7, 2.6, 2.5, 2.2, and 2.1 variants by workflow, speed, and integration needs.

lineupSections.title: Wan 2.7 Series
lineupSections.description: Wan 2.7 includes newer text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, and video editing workflows.
items: Use Wan 2.7 text-to-video or image-to-video for newer generation workflows.
Use Wan 2.7 reference-to-video when visual references should guide the output.
Use Wan 2.7 video editing when the task starts from an existing clip.

lineupSections.title: Wan 2.6 Series
lineupSections.description: Wan 2.6 variants cover text, image, and video-reference generation for production video pipelines.
items: Use Wan 2.6 text-to-video for prompt-led video generation.
Use Wan 2.6 image-to-video to animate source frames.
Use Wan 2.6 video reference when a source video should guide the generated output.

lineupSections.title: Wan 2.5, 2.2, and 2.1 Series
lineupSections.description: Earlier Wan variants remain useful for previewing behavior, supporting existing prompts, and comparing output across versions.
items: Use Wan 2.5 preview models to test earlier 2.x generation behavior.
Use Wan 2.2 and 2.1 variants for established text-to-video and image-to-video workflows.
Open each model page to confirm current API parameters and pricing.

whyNovitaTitle: Why run Wan on Novita AI

whyNovitaItems.title: Unified video model access
whyNovitaItems.description: Use Wan models through the same Novita AI model API surface as other generation families.

whyNovitaItems.title: Clear workflow routing
whyNovitaItems.description: Move from a collection page to the exact Wan endpoint for text, image, reference, video, or editing input.

whyNovitaItems.title: Test before production integration
whyNovitaItems.description: Review examples, pricing, and Playground behavior on each model page before wiring the model into an application.

faq.question: What Wan models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: Novita AI provides Wan 2.7, 2.6, 2.5 preview, 2.2, and 2.1 variants across text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, video-reference, and video-editing workflows.

faq.question: Which Wan version should I use first?
faq.answer: Start with Wan 2.7 for newer generation, reference, and editing workflows; use Wan 2.6 for text, image, or video-reference generation; use earlier versions when comparing behavior or supporting existing prompts.

faq.question: Can I compare Wan model pricing?
faq.answer: Yes. Open a Wan model page to review current pricing, request parameters, and Playground access.

guidanceLinks.label: Model APIs overview
guidanceLinks.description: Start with the Novita AI model API guide before integrating this model family.
